sampleInput.campaign_message: Healthy lunch decisions in under 10 minutes for busy urban teams.
sampleInput.offer: No offer required for message-only review.
sampleInput.key_message: Save time without sacrificing taste, nutrition, or team convenience.
sampleInput.claim: Under 10 minutes is a message assumption for review, not a verified production claim.
sampleInput.context: Reviewed offline Campaign Message Test sample for executive message-readiness planning.

summary.headline: Offline campaign-message test ready for executive review
summary.text: The offline Campaign Message Test sample shows light positive signal for message response, light positive signal for trust, and strong directional signal for channel reach. Treat this as a planning prompt for human review, not a forecast.

cards.title: Overall Reaction
cards.detail: Audience response is aggregate and synthetic; use it to choose the next approved message test.

cards.title: Message Clarity
cards.detail: The message is strongest when the time-saving benefit is stated with plain proof.

cards.title: Tone Fit
cards.detail: Helpful and practical tone should be paired with evidence before external use.

cards.title: Claim Readiness
cards.detail: Review the under-10-minute claim with product evidence before launch approval.

cards.title: Platform Fit
cards.detail: Short video and chat-friendly variants are better first tests than broad campaign scaling.

platformBreakdown.detail: Fixture channel cue only; use as a planning prompt, not measured live activity.

audienceInsights: Working Adults: emphasize speed, reliability, and proof that the lunch choice is practical.
Urban Consumers: lead with convenience and visible quality cues.
SME Owners: frame the message as a simple team convenience benefit, not a guaranteed outcome.
Campaign response fixture separates aggregate message comprehension from any actionable targeting or persuasion workflow.
risksCaveats: Reviewed offline sample only; not production-ready and not connected to production campaign systems.
Not suitable for persuasion optimization, voter targeting, microtargeting, or guaranteed prediction claims.
Dashboard signals require human review before executive or public-facing use.
Offline fixture only: no live social data, private data, CRM lists, or production prediction.
recommendedNextTest: Run a small approved message-readiness test: clarity-first headline versus trust-proof headline, reviewed by a human before launch use.
safetyLabels: No PII, CRM lists, private messages, or voter lists
No microtargeting, persuasion optimization, or conversion guarantees

assumptions: Campaign message is Healthy lunch decisions in under 10 minutes for busy urban teams.
Key message is Save time without sacrificing taste, nutrition, or team convenience.
Claim to review is Under 10 minutes is a message assumption for review, not a verified production claim.
Audience focus is Working Adults, Urban Consumers, SME Owners.
Use only aggregate, synthetic, offline assumptions with no customer records or private audience data.
message_theme: Healthy lunch decisions in under 10 minutes for busy urban teams.
The review contract was validated as offline/synthetic/demo-only before conversion.
Audience reactions are aggregate simulation signals, not measured public opinion or individual behavior.
No approved field data or backtest evidence is attached to this bridge output.
evidenceGaps: No real social platform APIs, private social scraping, private groups, CRM records, voter lists, or direct messages were used.
Treat outputs as synthetic simulation estimates unless separately validated with approved field data or backtests.
Offline sample mode uses deterministic sample data and is not evidence from the field.
limitations: Reviewed offline sample only; not production-ready and not connected to production campaign systems.
Not suitable for persuasion optimization, voter targeting, microtargeting, or guaranteed prediction claims.
Dashboard signals require human review before executive or public-facing use.
Offline workbench sample only; not a production simulator replacement.
Deterministic fixtures only by default; no live social APIs, private social data, credentials, PII, voter lists, or CRM data.
